title: D&M Optimized
description:
hi this is my personal modpack created for optimization and bug fixing!

you will be able to see the results immediately! and remember that it can be used in any minecraft server!
body:
Hi guys, this is a modpack created by me that focuses on optimization and bug fixes.
Once started, the results are visible immediately! here's what awaits you:

- many bug fixes of all kinds

- incredible optimization in chunk loading and general CPU and RAM management

- the modpack simulates the optifine in its entirety, allowing you to also use the resursepacks that are only compatible with the optifine

what are you waiting for download it now!
